## Problem

What limitation or friction are you trying to solve?

## Proposed idea

Describe the feature or behavior you want.

## Why it matters

Explain the user or developer value.

## Notes

Add constraints related to popup space, Chrome permissions, sync storage, or Tuya behavior if relevant.
